reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Energiaxxi
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Enter your password again.

error.incapsula: Blocked by Incapsula protection, try again later.

data_description.history_days: Days of consumption history requested each update. Endesa only serves the current billing period, so large values may not return older data.
data_description.price_days: Days of PVPC price history to import each update. Prices are national and imported whether or not consumption is available.
data_description.consumption_interval_hours: How often to poll Endesa for new consumption (max 48).
data_description.price_interval_hours: How often to poll the CNMC for new PVPC prices (max 48).

clear_statistics.name: Clear statistics
clear_statistics.description: Delete all Energiaxxi long-term statistics (energy, cost and PVPC price) so they can be rebuilt from scratch on the next update.
